title: Floral Crispy Italian Chickpea Stir-fry
description: This indulgent floral Italian chickpea stir-fry features a blend of aromatic herbs and spices to create a uniquely delightful flavor profile that’s both crispy and comforting.

ingredients.name: 250g chickpeas
ingredients.notes: Soaked overnight or for at least 6 hours

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons dried basil
ingredients.notes: Freshly chopped basil leaves can be used instead for extra freshness.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup Italian seasoning blend (store bought or homemade)

instructions: Soak the chickpeas for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the chickpeas. Pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a large bowl, combine the drained chickpeas, lemon juice, chopped garlic, onion slices, Italian seasoning blend, salt, pepper, and olive oil. Toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
Spread the chickpea mixture in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Once done, let it cool slightly before stirring in chopped basil leaves (or freshly chopped if available).
Serve hot as an indulgent side dish or main course.
